name: Command Execute
description: Activates when any command is used.

name: Scheduled Event
description: It activates at the time you schedule.

name: Delete Bulk Messages
description: Activates when multiple messages are deleted at once.

name: File Watch Event
description: It is activated when any operation is performed on a file in the selected directory.

name: Interaction Create
description: Activates when any interaction is triggered.

name: Member Boosted Server
description: Activates when a member boosts the server.

name: Member Join Voice Channel
description: Activates when a member joins a voice channel.

name: Member Leave Voice Channel
description: Activates when a member leaves the voice channel.

name: Member Move Voice Channel
description: Activates when a member is moved to another voice channel.

name: Member Start Streaming
description: Activates when a member starts streaming on the voice channel.

name: Member Stop Streaming
description: Activates when a member finishes streaming in a voice channel.

name: Message Reaction Added
description: Activates when you add a reaction to a message.

name: Message Reaction Removed
description: Activates after removing the reaction from the message.

name: Member Nickname Changed
description: It is activated when a member's nickname is changed.

name: Member Role Added
description: Activates when a member's role is added.

name: Member Role Removed
description: Activates when a member's role is removed.
